title: Environment_Pool__c Field Definitions
description: Schema for the Environment_Pool__c custom object used to track sandbox pool lifecycle. Used by the sf-sandbox-manager skill's Pool Setup workflow to auto-create the object and fields.

object.label: Environment Pool
object.description: Tracks sandbox environments for pool checkout/checkin lifecycle management

fields.label: Environment Name
fields.description: Sandbox name as it appears in Salesforce Setup

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Current lifecycle state of this environment

fields.label: Checked Out By
fields.description: Email or name of the user who has this environment checked out

fields.label: Checkout Timestamp
fields.description: When this environment was checked out

fields.label: Expected Return
fields.description: When the user expects to be done with this environment

fields.label: Purpose
fields.description: What this checkout is for (feature name, ticket number, etc.)

fields.label: Login URL
fields.description: Login URL for the sandbox environment

fields.label: Last Reset
fields.description: Last time this sandbox was refreshed/reset

fields.label: Sandbox Process ID
fields.description: SandboxProcess record ID for polling creation/refresh status

permissionSet.label: Environment Pool Access
permissionSet.description: Grants full access to Environment_Pool__c for sandbox pool management
